allow: Bash(timeout 30 npx remix vite:dev --port 5199 2>&1 | head -30 || true)
Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('typescript'\); console.log\('TypeScript version:', ts.version\)")
Bash(git add app/routes/api.dast-scan.ts app/routes/api.osv-pdf.ts app/routes/api.memory.ts app/routes/api.memory-context.ts)

Bash(git add app/components/workbench/terminal/TerminalTabs.tsx app/lib/common/prompts/discuss-prompt.ts app/lib/common/prompts/new-prompt.ts app/lib/common/prompts/optimized.ts app/lib/common/prompts/prompts.ts app/lib/runtime/action-runner.ts app/utils/projectCommands.ts)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: DAST quick scanner, Mem0 bug fixes, OSV PDF export

DAST:
- Add lightweight Node.js DAST scanner \(api.dast-scan.ts\) - no Docker needed
- Checks security headers, cookies, CORS, sensitive files, HTTPS, server disclosure
- All findings include CWE IDs and OWASP Top 10 references
- UI scan mode toggle: Quick Scan \(default, ~15s\) vs Deep Scan \(Docker/ZAP\)

Mem0 \(7 bug fixes\):
- Fix missing API key header on auto-save fetch calls \(Bug 1\)
- Fix user_id inconsistency - persistent userId across all chat sessions \(Bug 2\)
- Show dormant MemoryIndicator when configured but no memories yet \(Bug 3\)
- Auto-enable memory when API key is set but enabled was never toggled \(Bug 4\)
- Implement clear all memories via DELETE ?clearAll=true endpoint \(Bug 5\)
- Add pulse animation feedback on successful memory sync \(Bug 6\)
- Respect autoSaveConfig.enabled setting in auto-save logic \(Bug 7\)
- Fix missing x-mem0-user-id header in SaveContextButton and MemoryViewer

Reports:
- Implement OSV dependency scan PDF export \(generateOsvPdf + api.osv-pdf.ts\)
- Wire up OsvDialog download button to real PDF generation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: DAST quick scanner, Mem0 bug fixes, OSV PDF export

DAST:

- Checks security headers, cookies, CORS, sensitive files, HTTPS, server disclosure

- Add pulse animation feedback on successful memory sync
